case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. JAMES F CONWAY

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-12-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CONWAY, JAMES F SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-15-2010

MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-12-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-12-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
